title: Nursery Rhyme. CVI. Proverbs.
content:
The art of good driving 's a paradox quite,
            Though custom has prov'd it so long;
        If you go to the left, you're sure to go right,
            If you go to the right, you go wrong.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CVI. Proverbs." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
